name: Pretium Resources Inc.
description: Pretium Resources Inc. was a Canadian-based mining company primarily engaged in the acquisition, exploration, development, and operation of precious metal resource properties. The company was best known for its 100%-owned Brucejack Mine, a high-grade gold mine located in northern British Columbia. Pretium Resources focused on creating value through the responsible development of its gold assets. In March 2022, the company was acquired by Newcrest Mining Limited, marking the end of its status as an independent publicly traded entity on the Toronto Stock Exchange.
